name: Odoo Development Expert
description: Expert-level knowledge of Odoo 19 module development including __manifest__.py, models, views, controllers, OWL components, QWeb reports, RPC, testing, debugging, and linting.

prerequisites.description: Odoo ORM, security, and web framework

capabilities.name: Module Structure
capabilities.description: Create Odoo 19 modules with __manifest__.py, __init__.py, data files, models, views, controllers, security, and static assets. Follow directory conventions and naming standards.

capabilities.name: Model Development
capabilities.description: Define models, fields, inheritance, computed fields, constraints, onchange, defaults, and ORM methods. Use Odoo 19 decorators and patterns.

capabilities.name: XML Views
capabilities.description: Build form, tree, kanban, search, graph, pivot, calendar, and activity views with inheritance, xpath, and Odoo 19 view syntax.

capabilities.name: HTTP Controllers
capabilities.description: Implement Odoo 19 controllers with @route decorators, auth types, CSRF tokens, JSON endpoints, and public pages.

capabilities.name: OWL Components
capabilities.description: Develop Odoo 19 OWL components, hooks, services, templates, and client actions. Use lifecycle methods, props, and reactive state.

capabilities.name: QWeb Reports
capabilities.description: Create PDF/HTML reports using QWeb, ir.actions.report, paper formats, barcodes, and report templates in Odoo 19.

capabilities.name: RPC & API
capabilities.description: Use external API (XML-RPC, JSON-RPC), ORM methods, controllers, and OWL rpc service for data exchange with Odoo 19.

capabilities.name: Testing & Debugging
capabilities.description: Write Odoo 19 tests with TransactionCase, HttpCase, @tagged, mocks, and query count assertions. Use PDB, logging, and the Odoo shell.

capabilities.name: Linting & Quality
capabilities.description: Apply linting with flake8, pylint, black, pre-commit hooks, and Odoo 19 coding standards for Python and XML.

limitations: Development guidance assumes Odoo 19 syntax and patterns; older versions may differ
Complex OWL scenarios may require specific frontend architecture decisions
Performance optimization requires separate profiling and query analysis

metadata.author: Odoo AI Knowledge Factory
metadata.changelog: v19.0.1 — Initial development skill covering Odoo 19 module structure, models, views, controllers, OWL, reports, testing, and RPC
